title: Config File Diff
description: Compare two key=value configuration files and identify what changed between them. The two config files are separated by a line containing only '---'. Return a dictionary with three keys: 'added' (keys in new but not old), 'removed' (keys in old but not new), and 'changed' (keys in both but with different values, showing old and new values).
constraints: Each config line is in key=value format
The two configs are separated by a line containing only '---'
added: {key: new_value} for keys only in new config
removed: {key: old_value} for keys only in old config
changed: {key: {old: old_val, new: new_val}} for keys with different values
Keys with identical values in both configs are not reported

examples.input:
host=localhost
port=5432
debug=true
---
host=db.prod
port=5432
timeout=30
examples.explanation: timeout was added, debug was removed, host changed from localhost to db.prod. port=5432 is identical and not reported.

test_cases.description: One key added, one removed, one changed, one unchanged
test_cases.input:
host=localhost
port=5432
debug=true
---
host=db.prod
port=5432
timeout=30

test_cases.description: All values changed, nothing added or removed
